overview: Dreadspine is a SubBoss-class Undead/Demon monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 600 HP, 24 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 10 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Bone Claw at 150% ratio (360 base damage). combat radius 600.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Bone Claw (150%), Bone Claw Combo (150%).

phases.name: Ranged Attacks
phases.description: 4 ranged attacks. Projectile 01 (110%), Projectile 02 (110%), Projectile 03 (110%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Bone Prsion Snare
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Bone Prsion Snare icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 600, ability check distance 800
strategies.description: Combat area radius 600. Ability check distance 800.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
